Video.summary: Welcome back to the mixed pro doubles semifinal from Naples, Florida. This intense match features the teams of Rianna Livornese and Riley Bohnert against Marty Dancuart and Cody Braverman. The match is a thrilling display of skill, including powerful drives and dinks. The broadcast highlights a "golden pickle" moment and the commentator, Gigi LeMaster, provides expert insight into the strategic play of both teams as they battle for a spot in the final.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 3

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Dave Weinbach & Mari Humberg in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.summary: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop

Video.summary: April 17, 2021 - April 24, 2021 at the East Naples Community Park in Naples, Florida
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2021 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2021 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2021 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2021 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Video.summary: Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins take on Lily Kordic and Kara Williams in this Women's Senior Pro Semifinal match.

Video.summary: Jorja Johnson and Megan Fudge go head to head in this Gold Medal Match for the Women's Pro Singles at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Gold Medal Match

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 64: University of California, Irvine vs University of Central Florida
Video.title: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Video.summary: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! This highly anticipated clash pits the Bengaluru Jawans, who finished top of the table (number one seed), against the Hyderabad Superstars, who narrowly snuck into the semi-finals (number four seed) after winning two matches the previous night. This is a classic 1 vs. 4 match-up, with the winner stamping their ticket to Championship Sunday.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
